title: Polish RCA action button copy and flat styling

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing UI polish: shorten RCA action labels and switch to flat, borderless button styling for topic/category View-items actions.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed: shortened RCA action copy to 'View items (N)' and switched topic/category action buttons to flat, borderless styling (no outline/shadow). Updated related UI tests and verified with targeted Jest + dashboard build:fast.
